project.name: 盆景 Bonsai
project.positioning: AI 时代独立开发者的项目盆景园
project.tagline: From seed to bonsai · 想法的培育馆
project.language: Chinese first, with short English technical labels when useful

visualSystem.style: realistic polished product UI screenshot, not a wireframe, not a marketing landing page
visualSystem.density: quiet, utilitarian, scan-friendly, built for repeated updates
visualSystem.palette: warm white background, ink black text, moss green accents, muted terracotta, soft sky blue, pale amber status accents
visualSystem.typography: clean modern sans serif with high-quality CJK rendering, compact headings, crisp readable labels
visualSystem.shape: cards and controls use 8px radius or less; stable grid dimensions; no nested cards
visualSystem.texture: subtle paper grain and fine divider lines only; botanical influence should be restrained and functional
avoid: no decorative floating orbs or bokeh blobs
no browser chrome unless the screen explicitly asks for it

screens.title: 公开项目园首页
screens.primaryRequest: Show the public-facing home screen of Bonsai as an actual project garden overview. The first viewport is the product itself: a searchable, filterable board of a developer's projects.
screens.composition: top navigation, compact owner intro, status summary strip, filter toolbar, 3-column project card grid, right-side recent activity rail
screens.details: Project cards show compact cover thumbnails, status badges, tags, repo/demo link icons, and last updated dates. The overall feeling is personal, honest, current, and easy to scan in 30 seconds.

screens.title: 项目详情页
screens.primaryRequest: Show a single project detail page for one live project, focused on status, story, links, milestones, and lightweight metrics.
screens.composition: breadcrumb header, large project title area, status badge, wide cover image panel, story markdown column, right sidebar with links, metrics, and milestone timeline
visibleText: 一个小型自动化工厂游戏原型
screens.details: The cover image looks like a real app preview placeholder, not an abstract illustration. The milestone list shows dated events and status transitions. Keep the page calm and information-rich.

screens.title: 全站时间线
screens.primaryRequest: Show the global timeline view, a personal project cultivation log that aggregates status changes and milestones across all projects.
screens.composition: left filter sidebar, main vertical timeline grouped by month, each event row links to a project, top stats showing ideas, prototypes, live projects, archived projects
visibleText: 从 嫩芽 到 幼苗
从 幼苗 到 成型
screens.details: The timeline should make project evolution visible. Use thin lines, small status dots, compact event cards, and clear grouping. It should feel like a developer's year-in-review can emerge from this screen.

screens.title: 后台项目编辑器
screens.primaryRequest: Show the private admin project editor for quickly creating or updating a project in under one minute.
screens.composition: two-pane admin layout with left navigation, main form, status segmented control, tag editor, link fields, image upload area, markdown editor with live preview, sticky save bar
screens.details: The editor should feel fast and low-friction. Markdown text area and preview are visible side by side. The save action is obvious but not oversized.

screens.title: 移动端公开视图
screens.primaryRequest: Show the responsive mobile public view of Bonsai, optimized for sending a link to a friend or employer.
screens.composition: mobile top bar, compact owner intro, horizontal status chips, vertical project list, one expanded project summary with links and recent milestone
screens.details: The mobile screen must be readable, not a tiny desktop shrink. Use comfortable tap targets, compact cards, and a clear single-column hierarchy.
